backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor providing song and playlist management with functions to add songs, search by title/artist, create playlists, add songs to playlists, and retrieve all songs or specific playlists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (music player controls, library browsing, search, playlist management, responsive design, album artwork) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing routing, React Query hooks, audio player context, image mapping utilities, UI components, and pages for the music streaming app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, muted, accent, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, library, search, playlists, and playlist detail pages, wrapped in AudioPlayerProvider and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistDia: Modal dialog component allowing users to add a song to a playlist by entering the playlist name, with form validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AlbumArtwork.tsx: Reusable component rendering album artwork images with configurable sizes (sm, md, lg) using the imageMapper utility.
frontend/src/components/AlbumGrid.tsx: Grid component displaying albums grouped from songs with artwork, hover play button overlay, and click handler to play all album songs.
frontend/src/components/ArtistList.tsx: Grid component showing unique artists with circular profile images, song counts, and click handler to play all artist songs.
frontend/src/components/CreatePlaylistDi: Modal dialog for creating new playlists with name input, form submission handling, and success/error toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with bottom navigation (Home, Search, Library, Playlists), a fixed music player, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx: Fixed bottom music player UI showing current song, playback controls (play/pause, skip), progress slider, and time display using the useAudioPlayer hook.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Debounced search input component with a 300ms delay that triggers the onSearch callback with the current search term.
frontend/src/components/SongList.tsx: Displays a list of songs with album artwork, play/pause controls, and a dropdown menu to add songs to playlists; manages queue and playback state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.tsx: Context provider and hook for global audio playback state, managing current song, play/pause, queue navigation, seeking, and HTML5 Audio element lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using @dfinity/auth-client, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations: fetching/searching songs, creating playlists, adding songs to playlists, and managing song data with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors (background, primary, accent, etc.) and base styling for the application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that displays recently added songs and auto-populates 8 sample songs with external audio URLs if the library is empty.
frontend/src/pages/LibraryPage.tsx: Library page with tabbed interface showing songs, albums, and artists views using SongList, AlbumGrid, and ArtistList components.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Playlist detail page that displays songs in a specific playlist by filtering all songs against the playlist's song IDs.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Playlists overview page with a create playlist button and dialog, currently showing empty state placeholder.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: Search page with search bar that queries songs and displays results using SongList component with empty state handling.
frontend/src/utils/imageMapper.ts: Utility functions that map album names and artist names to static image paths and format song duration from seconds to MM:SS.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended animations, Inter font family, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining an Android music streaming app with completed features for playback controls, library browsing, search, playlists, and UI design with generated album/artist artwork.
